subcodes.first_line: O Faraj! Rejoice thou in God's deliverance, which hath come upon thee suddenly, even as the radiant Face dawneth from the horizon of a wondrous Temple [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا فرج ان افرح بفرج الله و انه جائک بغته کاشراق الوجه عن افق هیکل بدیع و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
